name: Nutstash Wallet
description: Nutstash is a Cashu wallet for your browser
compose:
name: slashnode-nutstash-wallet
services:
  web:
    image: ghcr.io/gandlafbtc/nutstash-wallet:0.1.10
    container_name: nutstash-wallet
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:4173:3000
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
